title: Security Breach + Billing + Cancellation Conflict
description: An enterprise customer cannot access their account, reports a suspicious login from an unknown location last night, sees an unexpected charge posted today, and demands immediate account cancellation and a full refund. The agent must prioritize security over billing and cancellation, route to trust & safety, request verification before taking any irreversible action, draft a safe response that does not promise immediate cancellation or refund, and escalate appropriately.
customer_message: I cannot log in to my account. I received an email last night saying someone from Russia logged into my account. There is also an unauthorized charge of $499 on my card from today. I want my account cancelled immediately and all charges refunded right now. This is a security emergency!

policy_context.policy_note: Do not promise cancellation or refund before identity verification and security review. Security team must review before billing team acts.

prior_history.notes: Login issue resolved — user forgot 2FA device.
